definitions.argmax_flip: The greedy action argmax_a Q(s,a) (or argmax pi) at a state flipped — the policy arrow actually changed.
definitions.policy_delta: The action distribution moved by more than the threshold (sum_a |pi_after - pi_before|) after a full minibatch x epoch update.
definitions.clip_active: The PPO probability ratio left [1-eps, 1+eps], so the clipped branch of the surrogate objective bound this sample.
definitions.advantage_sign_change: The advantage estimate changed sign between consecutive samples — the update flips from encouraging to discouraging an action.
